title: Combate Global: Mexico vs. USA: Parte 2

posts.author: Tapology
posts.body: The official Tapology discussion thread for the event!

posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 5 of 5 Pending | Tied for 1st with 13 others Vazquez vs. OrtikovGianni Vazquez, SUB, R3Poor Vazquez has had some awful luck recently. He got cut from the UFC after putting up a good fight, and then was told he needed another fight before coming back. He’s been booked twice but all of them are fallin through. He’s also in combate now so good luck ever getting out of that contract lol. Vazquez honestly isn’t that bad, if he’s not in contract he’ll I can def see him getting another fightOrtega vs. DomínguezJaden Ortega, TKO, R1Ortega seems good but it’s hard to guage him because he’s fighting complete cans. He is dominating them like he should but he’s also facing no resistance. That won’t change here since Dominguez is just a punching bag. I expect another highlight reel KO from Ortega
